name: Caltrop
description: Four-pointed caltrop diamonds biting into a grid, each re-shading on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 12%, 62% 38%, 88% 50%, 62% 62%, 50% 88%, 38% 62%, 12% 50%, 38% 38%); clip-path: polygon(50% 12%, 62% 38%, 88% 50%, 62% 62%, 50% 88%, 38% 62%, 12% 50%, 38% 38%); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
